title: callitriche aquatica subsp. platycarpa
intro: Callitriche aquatica subsp. platycarpa, also known as the broad-fruited water starwort, is a subspecies of aquatic plant belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Callitriche aquatica subsp. platycarpa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
